title: FogControl
description: Removes all fog in Minecraft with a single keybind toggle. Distance fog, nether fog, water fog, blindness, darkness — all of it. Press F (default) to toggle on/off. Client-side only, no server needed.
body:
# Fog Control

Removes all fog in Minecraft with a single keybind toggle.

## Features
- Removes **all** fog types — distance fog, nether fog, water fog, blindness, and darkness
- Simple **F key toggle** (rebindable in Controls settings)
- Hotbar message confirms when fog is on or off
- **Client-side only** — works on any server
- Zero performance overhead when fog is enabled

## Usage
Press **F** in-game to toggle fog on or off. You can rebind this in Options → Controls → Fog Control.

## Compatibility
Tested on Minecraft 1.21.11 with Fabric. No known conflicts.
Requires Fabric API.
